title: Crispy Mexican Sweet Paprika Stir-fry
description: A savory and crowd-pleasing mexican dish featuring sweet smoked paprika that caramelizes during the stir-fry process. Egg-free-friendly for those with egg allergies.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons sweet smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Such as Smoked Paprika from New Mexico or similar

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup cornstarch mixed with 1/4 cup water
ingredients.notes: Optional, can skip if you prefer a crispy texture

instructions: Preheat your wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. If using the cornstarch mixture, mix it thoroughly with vegetable oil and set aside.
Add the red bell pepper to the heated pan. Stir-fry until slightly softened and lightly charred, about 3 minutes. Remove from pan.
Add minced garlic and chopped onion to the same pan. Cook for an additional minute until fragrant but not browned.
Return the stir-fried bell peppers and any juices to the pan with the onions and garlic. Add sweet smoked paprika and cornstarch mixture (if using) to the pan.
Stir everything together evenly, let cook for about 1 minute to caramelize the spices. Add snow peas last, stirring quickly until just wilted and heated through.
Serve hot with extra oil on top if desired.
